meaning: v.用力吸,嗅,闻到,发觉,轻视,用力吸气n.吸,闻,吸气声,嗤之以鼻
examples: They train dogs to sniff out drugs.
The dogs are trained to sniff out drugs.
The sniff of power went to his head.
Maybe the growth hound would trot by, pick you out, sniff the goods, paw at you.
The rhino stood just 5m away, flaring its nostrils in the air to sniff us out.
